message:
refactor(screens): minor improvements to i18n, notifications, and terminal capability screens

i18n_demo.rs:
- Fix locale string formatting consistency
- Improve RTL text handling edge cases

notifications.rs:
- Update notification timing constants for better UX
- Fix toast positioning calculation

terminal_capabilities.rs:
- Add deterministic theme pinning in capability detection tests
- Improve color capability reporting accuracy
- Fix edge case in true color detection

These are small quality-of-life improvements discovered during test
stabilization work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
